problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
